framework.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Architecture
framework.description: MCP creates a standardized protocol for LLM-to-tool interaction through three core capabilities: tools (API functions), resources (knowledge/databases), and prompts (pre-defined templates). Servers expose these capabilities via list_tools, list_resources, and list_prompts endpoints. LLMs receive capability descriptions and intelligently select appropriate tools based on natural language queries.
framework.raw_quote: any mCP server will expose three capabilities tool resource and prompt their python SDK has simple examples for each of them
